title: Senior Software Engineer - BankBazaar Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BankBazaar Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
